deep_dive.title: PertReason: A Knowledge-Grounded Benchmark and Framework for Cell-State-Conditioned Mechanistic Reasoning of Perturbation Effects
deep_dive.abstract: Evaluating machine learning in scientific domains requires separating correct predictions from correct reasons under realistic distribution shifts. We introduce PertReason, a knowledge-grounded benchmark and framework suite for cell-state--conditioned reasoning about perturbation effects. At its core, PertReasonQA is a benchmark that tests whether models can generate mechanistically faithful explanations while remaining robust to complex shifts, such as new cells and unseen perturbations. PertReasonQA combines single-cell genetic and chemical perturbation data across multiple cellular contexts with knowledge graphs, and dynamically conditions pathways on cell-specific basal states to avoid generic memorization. Evaluations on state-of-the-art models reveal systematic gaps between predictive accuracy and mechanistic reasoning. Specifically, these models exhibit failure modes largely invisible to standard benchmarks, such as deriving correct answers through flawed logic, ignoring cellular context, and generating directionally inconsistent mechanisms. As a reference probe of the benchmark, we present PertReasonLM, a large language model trained to align outcome predictions with context-specific mechanistic reasoning. Our model targets the identified failure modes by grounding rationales in context-specific pathways and tightening agreement between outcomes and mechanisms. Together, we provide a diagnostic framework for exposing and mitigating failures in faithful reasoning in data-rich scientific systems.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Benchmark for deep learning methods in perturbation effect reasoning; knowledge-grounded and cell-state-conditioned
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 用于扰动效应推理的深度学习方法的基准；基于知识且条件化细胞状态
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 用于扰动效应推理的深度学习方法的基准；基于知识且条件化细胞状态
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 用于扰动效应推理的深度学习方法的基准；基于知识且条件化细胞状态
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Introduces PertReason, a knowledge-grounded benchmark and framework for cell-state-conditioned reasoning of perturbation effects, evaluating ML models on mechanistic faithfulness under realistic shifts.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 评估机器学习模型对扰动效应预测的鲁棒性和机械合理性至关重要。本文提出PertReason基准和框架，包含PertReasonQA测试集，结合单细胞遗传和化学扰动数据与知识图谱，动态条件化通路于细胞特异性基态，要求模型在新细胞和未见扰动下生成忠实解释。该工作为深度学习扰动响应预测方法提供了严格评估标准。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 评估机器学习模型对扰动效应预测的鲁棒性和机械合理性至关重要。本文提出PertReason基准和框架，包含PertReasonQA测试集，结合单细胞遗传和化学扰动数据与知识图谱，动态条件化通路于细胞特异性基态，要求模型在新细胞和未见扰动下生成忠实解释。该工作为深度学习扰动响应预测方法提供了严格评估标准。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Deep learning methods for perturbation response prediction

quick_skim.title: Deep Adaptive Bayesian Screening
quick_skim.abstract: We introduce Deep Adaptive Bayesian Screening (DABS), a method for performing adaptive factorial screening in high-dimensional discrete design spaces. DABS learns a policy network offline to sequentially select informative experiments, amortizing Bayesian Optimal Experimental Design. It handles binary designs, incorporates sparsity and interactions via a spike-and-slab prior with strong heredity. The model is trained using a contrastive lower bound on information about factor activity with nuisance effect sizes and noise variance analytically integrated out. Unlike prior amortized Bayesian design approaches, DABS also integrates Gibbs posterior inference at deployment, yielding posterior probabilities of factor activity and credible intervals on effect sizes. We demonstrate DABS on screening problems calibrated to real-world benchmarks and show it achieves superior accuracy and scalability over classical and Bayesian baselines under tight experimental budgets.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: adaptive Bayesian screening method for high-dimensional factor experiments, applicable to perturbation screening
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 自适应贝叶斯筛选方法，适用于扰动因子筛选
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 自适应贝叶斯筛选方法，适用于扰动因子筛选
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 自适应贝叶斯筛选方法，适用于扰动因子筛选
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: DABS performs adaptive factorial screening using amortized Bayesian optimal experimental design to identify important factors, directly applicable to perturbation experiments.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出深度自适应贝叶斯筛选（DABS），通过离线学习策略网络顺序选择信息量大的实验，利用尖峰-石板先验处理稀疏性和交互作用，在高维离散设计空间中识别重要因子，可直接用于扰动实验的因子筛选，有助于发现关键扰动因素。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文提出深度自适应贝叶斯筛选（DABS），通过离线学习策略网络顺序选择信息量大的实验，利用尖峰-石板先验处理稀疏性和交互作用，在高维离散设计空间中识别重要因子，可直接用于扰动实验的因子筛选，有助于发现关键扰动因素。
